---
title: "GLMMResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-element random-intercept GLMM fit output (PQL)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glmm`](../nitrix-stats-glmm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.glmm._base`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GLMMResult -->
```python
class GLMMResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:GLMMResult -->
Per-element random-intercept GLMM fit output (PQL).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GLMMResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(beta_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], blups: Float[Array, 'V q'], re_var: Float[Array, 'V r r'], dispersion: Float[Array, 'V'], deviance: Float[Array, 'V'], edf_total: Float[Array, 'V'], family: Family, n_obs: int, n_groups: int, tier: GLMMTier) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:GLMMResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `q` | random-effect columns |
| `r` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
